_comment: SERVER-SIDE ONLY. Load only in app/api/. Lab 5 = Extend & Deploy. Engineer hands-on; Navigator/Builder do a reflection card. Validator pings the participant's DEPLOYED endpoint and checks a valid grounded triage JSON. Channel stretch is out-of-timebox and droppable. prompt_ids resolve against content/prompts/test-prompts.json.

task-1.title: Deployed hosted agent returns a valid grounded triage JSON
task-1.probe_input: What diet should my father follow after heart failure?
task-1.submission: hosted agent endpoint or agent id (+ key if required)
task-1.rationale: Confirms Care Pal runs as a managed hosted agent (not a playground tab) and still produces the grounded, structured behaviour built across Labs 1-2.
task-1.correct_fun_fact: A hosted agent is the same brain with a front door — now anything with the endpoint can reach it.

reflection.title: Navigator / Builder reflection card
questions: In your own words, what does MCP give an agent?
Why deploy a hosted agent instead of using the playground?
Name one Care Pal task you would give a real tool.
What kind of action should always require human approval?
reflection.rationale: Keeps non-engineers engaged and scoring during the deploy demo without forcing them through the SDK.

stretch.title: Connect a channel (WhatsApp / Telegram sandbox)
stretch.rationale: Optional closing flourish — surface the hosted agent on a sandbox channel so a phone in the room can chat to it. Skipping costs nothing. Awards Channel Pioneer badge.
stretch.correct_fun_fact: The channel is the last mile — the hard part (a safe, grounded, deployed agent) is already done.
